subject: An ornate metal locket shaped like a stylized winged eye or shield, embossed with intricate filigree, surrounded by spilled gold coins on a dark surface
description: A gilded metal locket with an elaborate, symmetrical design dominates the frame, set against a smoky grey-black background. The locket reads as a stylized eye or hourglass form with a vertical seam down its center, wrought in gold filigree and capped at top and bottom with decorative finials. Loose gold coins spill across the lower foreground and pool around the locket, with a few more coins visible behind it and to the upper left. The composition is a still-life arrangement — no figures present — lit with soft ambient light that picks out the embossed metalwork. The mood is opulent, ecclesiastical, and slightly funereal, fitting the white-black Orzhov guild aesthetic of cathedral wealth and ghostly authority.
foreground: ornate gold locket and scattered coins
background: smoky dark grey gradient, almost void-like
